description: A monochrome OLED display module with I2C connectivity.

---

# Grove - OLED Display 1.12 inch

## Overview

The module uses SSD1306 to control a 128 by 64 pixel panel.

## Key Features

- Low power display
- Interface: I2C

## Parameters

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Resolution | 128x64 |
| Display color | monochrome |
| Supply Voltage | 3.3V to 5V |

## Pin Map

| Pin | Function |
| --- | --- |
| SDA | Serial data |
| SCL | Serial clock |

## Downloads

- [Library](https://github.com/Seeed-Studio/OLED_Display_128X64)
